old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-chnd","title":"[cross-impl] inconsistent TrickleTimer half/offset calc across Rust, Python, Zephyr C","description":"Rust/lichen-rpl/src/trickle.rs:112 uses half = interval/2; offset = rand_offset % half. Python/python/src/lichen/rpl/trickle.py:69 uses half=(interval+1)//2; range=interval-half. C/lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/trickle.c still contains unresolved merge conflict markers (HEAD vs origin/worktree-worker23 variants of half/range calc from deb58e88b merge). Leads to different transmit_time for odd intervals (e.g. interval=5). Tests use even values so undetected. Violates constants.toml canonical params and \"same algorithm\" rule. See lichen/tests/trickle/main.c and rust tests.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-23T00:32:57.762929026Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-23T00:32:57.762929026Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-chnd","title":"[cross-impl] inconsistent TrickleTimer half/offset calc across Rust, Python, Zephyr C","description":"Rust/lichen-rpl/src/trickle.rs:112 uses half = interval/2; offset = rand_offset % half. Python/python/src/lichen/rpl/trickle.py:69 uses half=(interval+1)//2; range=interval-half. C/lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/trickle.c still contains unresolved merge conflict markers (HEAD vs origin/worktree-worker23 variants of half/range calc from deb58e88b merge). Leads to different transmit_time for odd intervals (e.g. interval=5). Tests use even values so undetected. Violates constants.toml canonical params and \"same algorithm\" rule. See lichen/tests/trickle/main.c and rust tests.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-23T00:32:57.762929026Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-23T02:45:20.920793184Z","started_at":"2026-07-23T02:45:20.920793184Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-23T02:50:20.920793184Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-23T02:45:20.920793184Z"}
